source.golden: ttnn eltwise unary golden registry (name_to_golden_function['erfc'] = torch.erfc)
source.tests: test_eltwise_unary: ttnn.erfc(input_tensor, output_tensor=output_tensor, queue_id=cq_id) vs torch.erfc(in_data)

applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: ttnn.erfc(input_tensor, fast_and_approximate_mode={FAST_APPROX}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG}); constraints: {'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'dtype': ['bfloat16', 'float32'], 'notes': 'Unary eltwise op; supports fast_and_approximate_mode flag; supports preallocated output_tensor and queue_id per unit tests; tested input range [-10, 10].'}
